title: Kartoffelpuffer mit Zimt und Zucker (German Sweet Potato Pancakes)
description: A traditional German dessert made with sweet potatoes, parsnips, and a hint of cinnamon. These sweet pancakes are perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Grate the sweet potatoes and parsnip using a box grater.
In a large bowl, combine the grated sweet potatoes, parsnip, flour, sugar, cinnamon, eggs, melted butter, and vanilla extract.
Mix well until a smooth batter forms.
Heat a large non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown.
Serve the pancakes warm with a dusting of powdered sugar.
Optional: Serve with a side of whipped cream or a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
